summary: Completed testing of all 4 bug fixes: Like toggle API, Posts API is_liked_by_user field, Create Post page, and Settings logout button. All backend tests pass (6/6). All frontend features verified working on desktop and mobile.

issues: The 🤙 emoji in code appears to render as thumbs-up emoji in some browsers - this is an OS/browser font rendering difference, not a code issue. The code correctly uses '🤙' (line 483 in Feed.js)

critical_code_review_comments: Like toggle API (POST /api/posts/{post_id}/like?user_id={user_id}) correctly returns action: 'liked' or 'unliked' with toggle behavior
Posts API correctly returns is_liked_by_user field when user_id is provided
Feed.js correctly maps is_liked_by_user to 'liked' state for optimistic UI updates
handleLike function properly toggles based on current liked state
CreatePost.js is a fully functional component with file upload, caption, location inputs - NOT a placeholder
Settings.js has logout button with data-testid='logout-button' that is visible and accessible
Mobile navigation has Create button in bottom nav and Settings is accessible

verified_features.Like Toggle API: PASS - Returns action 'liked' on first call, 'unliked' on second, 'liked' on third
verified_features.Posts API is_liked_by_user: PASS - Field present when user_id provided, defaults to false without user_id
verified_features.Shaka Emoji in Code: PASS - Code uses 🤙 on line 483 of Feed.js
verified_features.Create Post Page /create: PASS - Full component with Photo/Video upload, NOT placeholder
verified_features.Settings Logout Button Mobile: PASS - Visible after scroll, position top=620px

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 bug fixes verified working: 1) Like toggle API works correctly with action field, 2) Posts API returns is_liked_by_user, 3) Create Post page at /create is fully functional, 4) Settings page has accessible logout button on both desktop and mobile. The shaka emoji 🤙 is correctly in code but may render differently across browsers/OS.
